pathways.name: Swift Concurrency Debut Path
pathways.description: Master Swift 5.5's brand-new concurrency model. Start with the language overview, then async/await fundamentals, structured concurrency with task groups, actors for safe shared state, then how it all integrates with SwiftUI and URLSession.

pathways.name: SharePlay Integration Path
pathways.description: Add Group Activities to your media or custom-experience app so it works on FaceTime calls. Learn the framework, design principles, custom session APIs, and the AVFoundation integration.

pathways.name: Object Capture & RealityKit 2 Path
pathways.description: Photogrammetry on Mac plus the RealityKit 2 ECS overhaul. Generate USDZ models from photos, then enrich them with custom systems, materials, and character controllers in your AR app.

pathways.name: Xcode Cloud Setup Path
pathways.description: Adopt Apple-hosted CI/CD with Xcode Cloud. Onboard the project, build out workflows for PRs and releases, and customize with scripts and TestFlight deployment.

pathways.name: DocC Adoption Path
pathways.description: Document your Swift framework or package with DocC. Start with the overview, then organize with documentation catalogs, build interactive tutorials, then automate hosting.

pathways.name: Focus & Notifications Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new interruption-level system, donate communication intents for prominent presentation in iOS 15, and handle the new system-wide Focus modes correctly.

pathways.name: Live Text & Vision Path
pathways.description: Use the new ML-powered document segmentation and improved text recognition in Vision. Build scanning UIs that handle real documents, barcodes, and on-device OCR.

pathways.name: iPadOS 15 Productivity Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new center-window scenes, keyboard navigation, the redesigned shortcut menu, and Quick Note. Make your iPad app feel as fluid as a Mac app.

pathways.name: SwiftUI 2021 Adoption Path
pathways.description: Adopt the year's SwiftUI advances: AsyncImage, .task/.refreshable, Table for Mac, Canvas drawing, materials, search, FocusState, and the new button system.

pathways.name: StoreKit 2 Modernization Path
pathways.description: Replace your in-app purchase code with StoreKit 2's async/await APIs. JWS-signed transactions, automatic verification, and unified entitlements.

pathways.name: Networking with HTTP/3 & QUIC Path
pathways.description: Speed up your app's networking with HTTP/3 (on by default in iOS 15), and build custom multiplexed protocols on top of QUIC via Network.framework.

pathways.name: App Performance & Hang Elimination Path
pathways.description: Diagnose and fix hangs, memory issues, and async/await pitfalls. Use Instruments, MetricKit field reports, and the Xcode Organizer to drive measurable improvements.

pathways.name: Mac Catalyst Polish Path
pathways.description: Take your iPad app to a Mac-native feel: tooltips, pop-up buttons, scene subtitles, printing, and proper menu bar integration.

pathways.name: Modern Media Capture & Playback Path
pathways.description: 10-bit HDR video capture, Center Stage and Portrait video effects, AVAsset async inspection, HLS Content Steering, and Spatial Audio.
